title: PenguinSMP+
description: For a better experience on the PenguinSMP Minecraft server.
body:
# PenguinSMP+
PenguinSMP+ allows you to use mods that are allowed on PenguinSMP! With this modpack, you will have an even better experience playing on PenguinSMP. It includes a minimap, performance boosts, voice chat, and more!

What is PenguinSMP?
PenguinSMP is a public survival server created for players who enjoy a friendly and engaging survival experience.

## Features

- FPS Boost
- Simple Voice Chat
- 3D Skin Layers
- Enhanced Sounds
- Shaders and more
   
## Installation
The PenguinSMP + modpack is compatible with Fabric, on versions 1.20.4, and can be installed through the Modrinth app or any other launcher that supports Modrinth.
